name: Pattaya Gym Directory
description: Independently-verified directory of every gym, Muay Thai camp, BJJ academy, golf course, dive operator, watersports, climbing, yoga and sport venue in Pattaya, Thailand.
attribution: Source: pattaya-gym.com (independent directory, no paid placements)

venues.name: Fairtex Training Center Pattaya
venues.address: 99/9 Moo 5, North Pattaya Rd, Naklua, Bang Lamung 20150
venues.description: World's largest Muay Thai resort camp. 9 rings, 17 trainers, on-site hotel & 25m pool. Champions: Yodsanklai, Stamp, Smilla Sundell, Saemapetch.

venues.name: Sityodtong Pattaya
venues.description: Founded 1960 by Kru Yodtong. 57+ world champions including Samart Payakaroon. Trained Rob Kaman & Ramon Dekkers. Pilgrimage destination.

venues.name: WKO Muay Thai & Fitness Pattaya (ISS Gym)
venues.address: 503/16 Moo 9, Pattaya Klang Rd, Nong Prue
venues.description: Owner Sifu McInnes was first Westerner to ref Lumpinee (1993). Resident trainer Sakmongkol (231-20-4, 3x Lumpinee, 5x WMC). ~฿4,000/month.

venues.name: Kombat Group Thailand
venues.area: Huai Yai / East Pattaya (rural, near Chak Nok Lake)
venues.address: 49/1 Moo 4, Soi Chaknok 19, Huai Yai, Bang Lamung 20150
venues.description: All-inclusive multi-discipline camp. Christian Daghio's legacy (190 MT fights, 7x World Champ). Muay Thai+Boxing+MMA+BJJ+Krav. 6 rings. 5/5 TripAdvisor.

venues.name: Battle Conquer Gym Pattaya
venues.description: Pattaya's only fully air-conditioned Muay Thai gym. Weight room, sauna, ice plunge. 7-day flexible scheduling, English-speaking trainers.

venues.name: Sor Klinmee Muay Thai Gym
venues.area: Nong Prue / East Pattaya (Soi Khao Talo area)
venues.description: Family-run authentic Thai camp, founded 2009 by Mit Klinmee. Home of Sudsakorn Sor Klinmee (278W/330F). Drop-ins ~฿200-300.

venues.name: Petchrungruang Gym
venues.description: Pattaya's 2nd-oldest gym (1986). Three generations of family. Head coach Khru Nu (Lumpinee 2nd-place, 90 fights). Home of Sylvie von Duuglas-Ittu (270+ fights).

venues.name: Rambaa Somdet M16 Muay Thai & MMA
venues.area: Nong Prue / East Pattaya (100m from Sor Klinmee)
venues.address: Nong Prue, Bang Lamung, Chonburi 20150 — 100m from Sor Klinmee
venues.description: Personal camp of Rambaa M16 — Thailand's first MMA world champion (Shooto Flyweight 2009) + Muay Thai legend. Cage on site. 100m from Sor Klinmee.

venues.name: Venum Training Camp Pattaya
venues.area: Soi Khopai / off Thepprasit Road (1.8 km from Jomtien Beach)
venues.address: Soi Khopai 12, off Thepprasit Rd, Bang Lamung 20150
venues.description: Modern multi-discipline facility near Jomtien. Muay Thai, MMA, BJJ, Combat Fitness, S&C, kids program. 2 rings + cage/mat zone.

venues.name: ALFA BJJ Pattaya
venues.address: Soi Ko Pai 12, Muang Pattaya, Bang Lamung, Chonburi 20150
venues.description: Pattaya’s first ever dedicated Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu gym. Standalone BJJ academy with Gi + No-Gi classes, all levels welcome. Pure-BJJ environment distinct from multi-discipline MMA gyms.

venues.name: Sanit Sport Club
venues.description: Two-zone Mabprachan club: comprehensive fitness centre + dedicated Muay Thai gym. 1,000+ members. Trainer Kru Rung — 40 years Lumpinee/Rajadamnern. Resident MAX Muay Thai champion Krasuk. 4 daily MT sessions.

venues.name: Lumpinee Boxing Stadium (Bangkok day-trip)
venues.area: Bangkok — Ramintra Road (1.5–2 hrs from Pattaya)
venues.address: 6 Ramintra Rd, Anusawari, Bang Khen, Bangkok 10220
venues.hours: Fight nights Friday + Saturday morning (no daily hours)
venues.description: World most prestigious Muay Thai stadium. ONE Lumpinee weekly Friday cards (12 bouts) + Fairtex Fight Saturday morning. Day-trip from Pattaya for serious MT students. Tickets ฿1500-4500.

venues.name: Rajadamnern Stadium (Bangkok day-trip)
venues.area: Bangkok — Ratchadamnoen Nok Avenue (1.5–2 hr from Pattaya)
venues.address: 8 Ratchadamnoen Nok Ave, Wat Sommanat, Pom Prap Sattru Phai, Bangkok 10100
venues.hours: Almost nightly — Sat RWS is flagship
venues.description: World first Muay Thai stadium, founded 1945. Almost nightly fight cards. RWS Rajadamnern World Series Saturday flagship (8 fights + free beers). Tickets ฿1,600-4,500. Pair with Lumpinee for canonical Bangkok MT weekend.

venues.name: Rage Fight Academy
venues.area: Thappraya Road / South Pattaya (5 min from Dongtan & Jomtien beaches)
venues.address: South Pattaya, 5 min from Dongtan and Jomtien beaches
venues.description: Multi-discipline academy: Muay Thai, Boxing, BJJ, MMA, Cross Training. 3 rings + BJJ/MMA mats. Education Visa sponsor for long-stays.

venues.name: Silk Muay Thai
venues.description: Premium boutique camp. 4.9/5 rated. All-inclusive packages from ฿25,500/month with private room + pool/sauna/spa + meals.

venues.name: Pattaya Thai Boxing & Fitness Gym (Jomtien)
venues.address: Soi 7, off Jomtien Beach Road, Pattaya
venues.description: Walk-in budget gym in Jomtien. ~฿300 for equipment + 4-5 rounds of pads. Pro fighter Champ on roster. Air fans, no AC.

venues.name: Fight EVO360 Muay Thai Gym
venues.address: 193/15 Moo 11, Thepprasit Road, Muang Pattaya, Bang Lamung District, Chonburi 20150
venues.description: Combines traditional Muay Thai and boxing values with structured sports science and performance-based programming. Stub — needs deep research.

venues.name: Sitpholek - Institute of Muay Thai Techniques
venues.description: Pattaya Muay Thai camp mentioned in 2025 best-of lists. Stub — needs deep research.

venues.name: CrossFit Pattaya @ The Jungle Gym
venues.description: Pattaya's only CrossFit affiliate. Multi-discipline: CrossFit + MMA + archery + dodgeball + slacklining. Coach Murray. UA & Decathlon partners.

venues.name: Tony's Fitness Gym (Tony's Group Pattaya)
venues.area: Multi-location — Wongamat, Soi Buakhao, Soi Diana Inn, 3rd Road + ~10 Pattaya locations
venues.description: Legendary old-school bodybuilding gym. Massive free-weights, no-frills, low monthly. A Pattaya institution.

venues.name: Platinum Fitness Club
venues.description: Pattaya Klang central commercial gym with 17.5-hour daily operating window (05:30-23:00), full air-conditioning, comprehensive cardio + weight machines, group classes, and sauna.

venues.name: Coco Fitness
venues.address: 4th floor, Mike Shopping Mall, 262 Beach Road, Pattaya 20150
venues.description: Central Pattaya commercial gym on the 4th floor of Mike Shopping Mall. Sea-view cardio, walk-in day passes, towel and locker included, and value monthly pricing.

venues.name: Universe Gym
venues.address: Welcome Town, off Sukhumvit Rd, North Pattaya
venues.description: Excellent machine assortment, multiple membership packages. North Pattaya commercial gym for varying ability levels.

venues.name: Fitz Club — Racquets, Health & Fitness (Royal Cliff Hotels Group)
venues.address: Royal Cliff Hotels Group, Pratumnak Hill
venues.description: Award-winning luxury sports club: 7 tennis courts, 2 AC squash courts, table tennis, swimming, gym, professional coaching. Premium tier.

venues.name: Elite Gym & Fitness Pattaya
venues.area: Sukhumvit Road (between Soi 42 and 44, opposite Soi 65)
venues.address: 392/62 Sukhumvit Road (between Soi 42 and 44, opposite Soi 65), Pattaya
venues.description: Modern facility with top-notch equipment. Integrates yoga and other fitness programs.

venues.name: Jetts Fitness Pattaya
venues.address: 8/114 Sukhumvit Rd, Bang Lamung District, Chonburi 20150 (Little Walk Mall)
venues.description: 24/7 fitness chain. Royal Garden Plaza branch closed May 2022; Little Walk remains the only Pattaya club. No-contract memberships, modern equipment.

venues.name: Anytime Fitness Pattaya
venues.address: Bukis Point Mall, Thappraya Rd (South Pattaya) + Again Pattaya complex
venues.description: Anytime Fitness 24/7 commercial gym in Pattaya — Bukis Point South Pattaya branch on Sukhumvit Rd plus Again Pattaya outpost. International chain access via single membership.

venues.name: Fitness 7 Pattaya (The Avenue)
venues.area: The Avenue Pattaya / Central Pattaya (parallel to Beach Road)
venues.address: Avenue Pattaya, between 2nd Rd and Soi Buakhao
venues.description: 2000+ sqm, 24-hour gym in Avenue Pattaya. Cardio, weights, free weights, boxing ring, functional training areas.

venues.name: True Fitness Pattaya
venues.description: Popular fitness chain: HIIT, yoga, spinning. Modern facility, group classes, nutrition counseling.

venues.name: Castra Gym
venues.description: Relaxed atmosphere from bodybuilders to general fitness. East Pattaya location, less touristy.

venues.name: SUN Fitness Pattaya (3 branches)
venues.description: 3-branch chain across Pattaya — single membership accesses all. Soi Buakhao + Naklua branches.

venues.name: Cross Pattaya Pratamnak (Cloud Club + PLAYROOM)
venues.description: Pratamnak Hill hotel fitness club with Cloud Club gym, PLAYROOM kids zone, swimming pool, and day-pass access for non-guests. Walkable to Royal Cliff cluster.

venues.name: Manhattan Pattaya (Hotel Gym)
venues.description: Manhattan Pattaya hotel gym on Pratamnak / Central Pattaya — fitness equipment, outdoor swimming pool, and day-pass access for non-guests within walking distance of beach.

venues.name: Yoga Pattaya Studio
venues.description: Pattaya's first international yoga studio. Ashtanga, Mysore, Hatha, Vinyasa Flow, Stretching, Fitness Yoga. English/Russian/Thai.

venues.name: Yoga Haus Pattaya
venues.description: Pattaya's most prominent hot yoga studio. Modern fitness-yoga vibe with Hot Yoga and Fit Ball. Walkable central.

venues.name: Ashtanga Yoga Pattaya
venues.description: Traditional Ashtanga yoga studio offering Mysore-style self-practice and led primary series classes with hands-on adjustments. Soi 12 Thepprasit / Jomtien.

venues.name: One-D Yoga Studio
venues.address: 571/32 Moo 5, Naklua 16/2, Pattaya-Naklua Road, Pattaya, Chonburi 20150
venues.hours: Daily classes — verify schedule with studio
venues.description: Modern multi-style yoga studio at 571/32 Naklua 16/2 offering daily Hatha, Vinyasa Flow, and Yin classes plus private sessions, workshops, and weekend / weeklong retreats.

venues.name: Nok Yoga Pattaya
venues.area: Naklua / Pattaya-Naklua Road (near Jomtien Beach for some sessions)
venues.description: Naklua / Pattaya-Naklua Road yoga studio offering Hatha, Vinyasa, and traditional Thai Reusi Dat Ton stretching for all levels with some sessions at Jomtien Beach.

venues.name: Balance Yoga Studio Pattaya
venues.description: Yoga + sound healing. Steps from the sea. 'Island of harmony in sunny Pattaya'.

venues.name: Siam Country Club Pattaya
venues.description: Multiple championship courses: Old Course (1970, Top 100 world), Plantation, Waterside. Asia's premier golf destination.

venues.name: Laem Chabang International Country Club
venues.description: Jack Nicklaus design (1995). 27 holes. Widely considered the best golf course layout in Pattaya.

venues.name: Phoenix Gold Golf & Country Club
venues.description: Multiple loops with beginner-friendly options. Established Pattaya golf destination.

venues.name: Burapha Golf Club
venues.description: 36 holes designed for natural beauty (lakes, hills, palms). Hosted 2010 Thailand Open. Top tournament venue.

venues.name: Treasure Hill Golf & Country Club
venues.area: Ban Bueng / Khao Khansong (60 km from Pattaya)
venues.description: Par-72 course, established 1994. Popular for low green fees and enjoyable rounds.

venues.name: Chee Chan Golf Resort
venues.description: Premium destination golf resort in Na Jomtien / Sattahip with Buddha Mountain views, championship layout, and modern clubhouse facilities. ฿฿฿ green fees.

venues.name: Chatrium Golf Resort Soi Dao Chanthaburi
venues.area: Khao Soi Dao Mountains, Chanthaburi (3 hours from Pattaya)
venues.description: 27-hole course, driving range, pro shop, three-floor clubhouse with hotel, pool, locker rooms, spa, restaurants.

venues.name: Pattana Golf Club & Resort (Pattana Sports Resort)
venues.area: Si Racha (40 km north of Pattaya, 90 min from Bangkok)
venues.description: 27-hole Pattana Golf Club & Resort in Si Racha — championship layout (40 km north of Pattaya, 90 min from Bangkok) plus on-site sports resort with multiple recreation amenities.

venues.name: St. Andrews 2000 Pattaya
venues.area: Ban Chang, Rayong (45 min from Pattaya)
venues.description: St. Andrews 2000 — championship 18-hole golf course in Ban Chang, Rayong (45 min from Pattaya) with mature parkland setting and full clubhouse facilities.

venues.name: Khao Kheow Country Club
venues.area: Bang Phra / Si Racha (between Bangkok and Pattaya)
venues.description: Pete Dye-designed 27-hole championship course in Bang Phra / Si Racha — host of Asian Tour Thailand Open and one of Pattaya's most strategic, water-defined layouts.

venues.name: Bangpra International Golf Club
venues.area: Sri Racha / Bang Phra (40 km north of Pattaya)
venues.address: 45 Moo 6, Bang Phra, Si Racha, Chonburi 20110
venues.description: Opened 1958 — one of the first golf courses in the Pattaya region. 18 holes, par 72, 1988 renovation.

venues.name: Mountain Shadow Country Club
venues.area: Halfway between Bangkok and Pattaya / Si Racha
venues.description: Ron Fream-designed 18-hole par-72 golf course halfway between Bangkok and Pattaya, built on a former mango plantation with four rare island greens and 6,722-yard layout.

venues.name: Pattaya Country Club
venues.area: Khao Mai Kaeo (one of the closest courses to Pattaya proper)
venues.description: 18-hole Pattaya Country Club at Khao Mai Kaeo — one of the closest golf courses to Pattaya proper with championship layout, mature parkland setting, and value-tier green fees.

venues.name: Pattaya Golf Driving Range
venues.description: Standalone Pattaya driving range with multi-tier hitting bays, putting green, short-game practice area, and equipment rental — ideal for warm-ups before championship rounds.

venues.name: Pattaya Tennis Club
venues.description: Central Pattaya outdoor tennis facility with multiple floodlit hard courts, coaching for all levels, equipment rental, drop-in pickup play, and member-led social leagues.

venues.name: Greta Sport Club Pattaya (at Greta Resort)
venues.area: Na Jomtien / Sattahip (18 km south of central Pattaya / Walking Street)
venues.address: 68/18 Moo 3, Soi Wat Yanasangwararam, Na Jomtien, Sattahip, Chonburi 20250
venues.description: 6 covered tennis courts with rain protection. Beautifully constructed roofed tennis venue.

venues.name: Tara Tennis Club
venues.description: Newly resurfaced 2022 Pattaya tennis club with 3 hard courts including one covered roof for rain or sun protection. Coaching, hourly hire, social play.

venues.name: TOS Tennis Club / TOS Tennis Academy
venues.area: Baan Suan Lalana — Jomtien Beach (closest to Jomtien)
venues.description: TOS Tennis Club / TOS Tennis Academy at Baan Suan Lalana — Jomtien Beach side tennis facility (closest to Jomtien) with hard courts, coaching, and social play.

venues.name: Siam Bayshore Resort Pattaya Tennis Courts
venues.area: Walking Street area / South Pattaya Beach Road
venues.description: Siam Bayshore Resort tennis courts on Walking Street area / South Pattaya Beach Road — 3 outdoor hard courts open to hotel guests and day visitors.

venues.name: Euro Badminton
venues.description: East Pattaya multi-sport club on Soi Chaiyaphruek 2 with badminton courts, swimming pool, and on-site Thai-food restaurant — popular casual community venue.

venues.name: Diamond Badminton
venues.description: South Pattaya badminton facility on Pattaya 3rd Road with multiple wood-floor courts available for hourly hire, plus equipment rental and casual play nights.

venues.name: Pattaya Tennis & Badminton Inter Club
venues.description: Multiple courts: pickleball, badminton, tennis, table tennis. Multi-racquet facility.

venues.name: Pickleball Pattaya
venues.description: Pattaya's flagship dedicated pickleball facility on Pratumnak Soi 6. Two full-sized courts, paddles, balls, ball machine, strong lighting, and beginner lessons from an English-speaking licensed coach.

venues.name: Play Padel Pattaya
venues.description: Pattaya's first dedicated padel club at Kasetsin Soi 3, Pratumnak — also Thailand's first indoor padel courts with bookable hourly play, equipment rental, and clinics for all levels.

venues.name: Pattaya Sports Club
venues.description: Multi-sport sports club with tennis and other facilities. Non-profit, ~4,700 active members.

venues.name: Manta Kids Pattaya (IG Center)
venues.address: 53/48 Chaiyaphruek 2 Rd, Huayyai, Bang Lamung, Chonburi 20150
venues.description: Premier kids swim academy. Head coach is former Thai national swimmer. ASCTA-certified instructors. ฿9,900/quarter (10 sessions).

venues.name: BOUNCE Pattaya — Trampoline Park
venues.address: 6th Floor, Harbor Pattaya, 190/25 Moo 9, Central Pattaya Rd
venues.description: International trampoline park franchise on 6F Harbor Pattaya Mall. Free Jump arena, slam dunk lane, dodgeball, performance airbag, Mini BOUNCE for toddlers. BOUNCE FIT adult cardio classes. Same building as Deep Climbing + Bean Cow.

venues.name: First Serve Sports Club
venues.description: Swim teaching by Swimming Association of Thailand-trained instructors. All ages, English or Thai.

venues.name: Hard Rock Pool Pattaya
venues.area: Hard Rock Hotel Pattaya — Central Pattaya Beach Road
venues.description: Hard Rock Hotel Pattaya iconic guitar-shaped 2,000 sqm free-form pool with artificial sand beach, swim-up bar, and day-pass access for non-guests on Beach Road.

venues.name: Naklua Public Swimming Pool
venues.description: City-operated public swimming pool in Naklua / North Pattaya offering affordable lap-swim and recreational access with kids' pool, changing rooms, and resident discounts.

venues.name: Jomtien Public Swimming Pool
venues.description: One of Pattaya's two public swimming pools — operated by the city on the South Pattaya / Jomtien border with affordable lap-swim access, kids' pool, and changing facilities.

venues.name: Mermaid's Dive Center
venues.area: Jomtien (Soi White House) + Pattaya Beach Road + Bangkok (Amarin Plaza)
venues.address: Soi White House, Jomtien Beach Road
venues.description: PADI 5-Star IDC dive center. Day trips, courses beginner to instructor, technical diving.

venues.name: Pattaya Dive Centre
venues.area: Pattaya Beach Road (between Soi 10 and Soi 11)
venues.description: Pattaya's only Beach Road PADI Dive Centre. 24+ years established. All PADI courses + Tec.

venues.name: Seafari PADI Dive Centre
venues.area: Behind Mike's Mall — 2 min from Pattaya Beach Road
venues.address: Behind Mike's Mall, 2 min from Pattaya Beach Road
venues.description: PADI dive center 2 minutes from Pattaya Beach Road behind Mike's Mall — full course progression from Open Water through Divemaster, plus daily fun-dives to Pattaya islands.

venues.name: Pattaya Scuba Adventures
venues.area: Pattaya / boat operations from Bali Hai Pier
venues.description: PADI dive center based in Pattaya with boat operations from Bali Hai Pier — full course progression, daily fun-dives to Pattaya islands, and guided trips for certified divers.

venues.name: No Limit Divers
venues.description: PADI 5-Star Instructor Development Center based in Pattaya / Jomtien, offering full PADI internship programs from Open Water Diver through Course Director-level certification.

venues.name: Jomtien Dive Center
venues.description: PADI 5-Star Instructor Development Center on Jomtien Beach offering full PADI course progression from Open Water through Divemaster + Instructor — long-trusted operator.

venues.name: Clubloongchat Watersports
venues.description: Beachside watersports school: kitesurfing, wingfoiling, windsurfing, sailing, SUP. Expert lessons + rentals.

venues.name: Kitesurf Pattaya
venues.description: IKO-certified kitesurfing school at south end of Jomtien Beach. 3-day beginner package from $250 includes equipment, instruction, and IKO Level 1-2 certification.

venues.name: KBA Kiteboarding Asia Pattaya (Blue Lagoon)
venues.address: Blue Lagoon, 23/4 Moo 2, Soi Tanmanjai 14, Na Jomtien, Sattahip, Chonburi 20250
venues.description: KBA Pattaya kiteboarding + foiling school at Blue Lagoon Na Jomtien. Pattaya branch of Thailand's leading multi-location chain (also Samui, Phuket, Hua Hin, Phangan).

venues.name: Wave Pattaya Watersports
venues.description: Multi-sport watersports operator across Pattaya Beach + Jomtien Beach — parasailing, jet ski, banana boat, SUP, kayak, plus arrangement of dive trips and beach activities.

venues.name: Deep Climbing Gym (Harbor Pattaya)
venues.area: Na Kluea / North Pattaya — Harbor Pattaya Mall, 8th Floor
venues.address: Harbor Pattaya, Floor 8, 190/25 Moo 9, Pattaya Klang Rd, Na Kluea, Bang Lamung, Chonburi 20150
venues.description: Pattaya's first indoor climbing gym. Air-conditioned, 10m wall, ocean theme. Top rope, auto-belay, lead, bouldering routes.

venues.name: Bean Cow Climbing Gym & Community Center
venues.address: 61/23 Moo 1, Huay Yai, Bang Lamung District, Chonburi 20150
venues.description: Family-friendly climbing gym. 8m wall. Top rope + lead climbing. CWA-certified teachers, belayer services, top rope safety classes.

venues.name: Pattaya Hash House Harriers
venues.area: Pattaya / East Pattaya / various run locations
venues.address: Weekly run from rotating start points
venues.description: First Pattaya hash, mixed running club since 1984. World's largest weekly running club. 'Drinking club with a running problem'.

venues.name: Pattaya Monkey Hash House Harriers
venues.area: Various (run starting points across Pattaya region)
venues.description: Pattaya hash variation. Runs every 2nd, odd-numbered month, usually 3rd Saturday. ~2.5h duration.

venues.name: AF Academy Football School
venues.area: South Pattaya (outdoor field) + Central Pattaya (indoor field)
venues.description: Football school for children. Coaches with international children's coaching experience. Indoor + outdoor fields.

venues.name: Pattaya City Football Academy
venues.description: Bronze-level Academy License (Football Association of Thailand). Children ages 6-14.

venues.name: Planet Football Pattaya (FC Planet)
venues.description: Multi-tier football academy in Pattaya — soccer schools for beginners, development squads, competitive academy programs, and FC Planet senior team for ages 5+ to adults.

venues.name: Rusich Club Pattaya (HSIF Thailand)
venues.description: Russian-language football academy in Pattaya for ages 5-16 (HSIF Thailand). Coaching, weekly training, age-group teams, and Russian-speaking coaches.

venues.name: Regents International School Pattaya (Sports)
venues.description: International school sports programs: basketball, football, swimming, athletics, rugby, cricket. For school students.

venues.name: Horseshoe Point Resort & Country Club
venues.address: Soi Siam Country Club, near Mabprachan Reservoir, Pattaya
venues.description: 1,500-acre equestrian + adventure mega-facility. International Riding School (est 1999). 5 indoor/outdoor arenas, 100+ horses (Lusitano, Appaloosa, Lipizzaner, Arabs, Warmbloods, Falabella, Thai pony). Polo. Paintball. Zipline. Mountain biking. Multi-sport field. Accommodation.

venues.name: Muscle Factory Pattaya
venues.address: Pratumnak Soi 5, Nongprue, Bang Lamung, Chonburi 20150
venues.description: Largest hardcore gym in Pattaya. Multi-floor 3-story Pratamnak bodybuilding institution. Bangkok sister gym. Industrial fans, no AC.

venues.name: Cartoon Network Amazone Waterpark (now Columbia Pictures Aquaverse)
venues.area: Na Jomtien / Sattahip — 15 km south of Pattaya
venues.description: World first themed waterpark. 18 slides across 3 zones. Polin Waterparks hardware. Rebranded 2022 to Sony Pictures IPs. 15km south of Pattaya.

venues.name: EasyKart Pattaya Thepprasit (Outdoor Go Kart Track)
venues.address: 168/24 Moo 12 Thepprasit Road, Pattaya City, Bang Lamung, Chonburi 20150
venues.description: Newest go-kart facility in Pattaya. Outdoor 350m beginner + 800m racing tracks. Multi-tier classes: Kids/Regular/Fast/2-Seater. From 480 baht.

venues.name: FAST PRO Football Academy Pattaya
venues.area: Two locations — Horseshoe Point Pattaya + IP Soccer Club Pattaya
venues.address: Horseshoe Point Pattaya + IP Soccer Club Pattaya
venues.description: UEFA-A licensed European football coach. Ages 4-15. Two locations. European-style technical + tactical + character training.

venues.name: Golf Hub Pattaya (Indoor Simulator + Club Fitting)
venues.description: Only premium indoor simulator + club fitting in Pattaya. TrackMan / GC Quad launch monitor. AC year-round practice. Multiple locations.

venues.name: Ramayana Water Park Pattaya
venues.area: Na Jomtien / Sattahip — 20 km south of Pattaya
venues.description: Largest water park in Thailand and Southeast Asia. 184,000 sqm. 26 slides / 34 lanes. 600m lazy river around natural hill. Double wave pool with 150m beach. TripAdvisor 2019 #1 Asia / #10 World.

venues.name: AF Academy Football School Pattaya
venues.area: Naklua + Jomtien + Pratumnak + Central Pattaya (multiple training locations)
venues.address: 215/18 Moo 6, Tambon Na Kluea, Pattaya City 20150
venues.description: From age 3 — youngest accepted in Pattaya football. Multi-location. Russian/English/Thai. Indoor + outdoor fields.

venues.name: Diana Driving Range Pattaya
venues.description: 30-bay floodlit dedicated driving range. 200-yard depth. On-site restaurant. Soi Diana area central. Professional teaching pros.

venues.name: Pratumnak Fitness Park (Free Outdoor Calisthenics)
venues.description: Pattaya FREE outdoor public fitness park. Free weights + machines + cardio + calisthenics. Pratumnak Hill / Buddha Hill setting. Up to 75lb dumbbells.

venues.name: Pattaya Bowl (Soi Regent Marina)
venues.area: North Pattaya — Pattaya 2nd Road / Soi Regent Marina
venues.address: 463/78 M.9, Soi Regent Marina, Pattaya 2nd Rd
venues.description: Pattaya's classic North Pattaya bowling alley off Pattaya 2nd Road / Soi Regent Marina — modern lanes, casual pricing, hourly hire, plus arcade and food.

venues.name: Pattaya Park Water & Fun Park (with Tower Jump)
venues.area: South Pattaya / Jomtien border — Soi 12 Thappraya Rd
venues.address: Pattaya Park Beach Resort, Soi 12 Thappraya Rd
venues.description: Original Pattaya 1989 complex. Tower Jump (170m zip line from 56th floor) + water park + private beach + amusement park.

venues.name: Thai Sky Adventures (Tandem Skydiving Pattaya)
venues.area: Dropzone 25 km north of Pattaya / Rayong direction
venues.address: Drop zone near Nong Kho Reservoir, ~25 km north of Pattaya — hotel pickup included
venues.description: Southeast Asia only full-time skydive drop zone. 25+ years. Tandem from 13,000 ft. 60s freefall at 200 km/h. Free Pattaya pickup.

venues.name: Thai Polo & Equestrian Club
venues.area: Banglamung / Mabprachan Lake (25 min north of Pattaya)
venues.description: Largest multi-functional polo + equestrian in all Asia. 250 hectares. 3 polo fields + 2 practice. 250+ stables. Endurance + Derby. Argentinian vet GM.

venues.name: Bira Circuit (FIA-Standard Motor Racing Track)
venues.description: Thailand first FIA-standard motor racing circuit. 2.41 km. 30 pit garages. 30,000 spectator capacity. SEATCZC + Asian Formula 2000 host since 1990s. Named after Prince Birabongse - Thailand first F1 driver.

venues.name: JumpZ Trampoline Park
venues.area: Harbor Pattaya Shopping Mall — Central Pattaya Road
venues.address: Harbor Pattaya Mall, 6F, Central Pattaya Rd
venues.description: Pattaya main indoor trampoline park. 6th floor Harbor Pattaya Mall. Indoor AC family activity.

venues.name: Pattaya Shooting Park
venues.area: Soi Khao Mai Kaew / East Pattaya
venues.address: 8 Moo 4, Soi Khao Mai Kaew, Pattaya
venues.description: Largest outdoor shooting range in Pattaya. Diverse firearms (.22, .38, .45, 9mm, shotguns). Free hotel pickup in most packages.

venues.name: Dragon Shooting Club Pattaya
venues.description: Largest indoor shooting range in Thailand. 20 standard + 3 private VIP lanes. Modern firearms. Fully air-conditioned.

venues.name: Thai Wake Park Pattaya
venues.description: Pattaya only cable wakeboarding park. Two lakes (beginner + advanced). All equipment included.

venues.name: Pattaya Padel Club (Mabprachan Lake)
venues.description: Lakeside padel courts on Mabprachan Reservoir. Pattaya second padel facility alongside Play Padel.

venues.name: SailBreeze Sailing School @ Ocean Marina Yacht Club
venues.address: Ocean Marina Yacht Club, 274/1-3 Sukhumvit Rd, Na Jomtien, Sattahip 20250
venues.description: Thailand most experienced sailing school (20+ years). Based at Ocean Marina Jomtien — Southeast Asia largest marina (450+ berths). IYT certification + yacht charters.

venues.name: Royal Varuna Yacht Club
venues.address: 286 Moo 12 Pratamnak Rd, Nongprue, Banglamung, Chonburi 20150
venues.hours: Members + RYA training daily; regattas Jan-Mar peak
venues.description: Thailand most prestigious yacht club, founded 60+ years ago. RYA-accredited sailing + powerboating training. World-class regattas (ILCA, OK Dinghy, Optimist, Dart, Hobie, Multihull). Pratamnak Hill clubhouse + pool + boat storage + beach bar.

venues.name: Ocean Marina Jomtien — Southeast Asia's Largest Marina
venues.address: Ocean Marina Yacht Club, 274/1-9 Sukhumvit Rd, Na Chom Thian, Sattahip District, Chonburi 20250
venues.description: Southeast Asia largest marina. 455 wet berths + 100 trailer + 30 hardstand. Yachts up to 75m. Award-winning. Top of the Gulf Regatta host. SailBreeze sailing school on-site. Yacht charter + brokerage hub. Customs clearance for international yachts.

venues.name: Pattaya Cycling Clubs (Cuore Masters / Monkey Xtreme / Jomtien Cycling)
venues.area: Various — meet points across Pattaya / East Pattaya / Jomtien
venues.description: Multiple road and MTB clubs. Cuore Masters Team + Monkey Xtreme + Jomtien Cycling + Pattaya MTB. Free to ฿2,000/year.

venues.name: Pattaya Bike and Boat Tours
venues.address: 157/58-59 Moo 5 Pattaya-Naklua Road (between Soi 18 and 18/1), Pattaya
venues.description: Guided bicycle + boat tour operator. Quiet back-road routes through real Thai villages, plantations, fishing communities. Small-group English-speaking tours. Bike rental also available. Naklua-based.

venues.name: Pattaya Sai 3 Petanque Club
venues.description: French-influenced petanque community. Central Pattaya Soi 3. All ages, drop-in friendly.

venues.name: Jomtien Beach Volleyball Courts
venues.description: Pattaya beach volleyball community. Multiple Jomtien courts. Free pickup play. Mixed Thai-international.

venues.name: Adventure Divers Pattaya
venues.area: Central Pattaya — boat operates from Bali Hai Pier
venues.address: Pattaya, Bang Lamung — Bali Hai Pier departures
venues.description: Established 1998. 27+ years operating. Own dive boat MV Saifon. Full PADI pipeline. HTMS Khram wreck specialist. English/Russian/Thai instruction.

venues.name: Tarzan Adventure Pattaya (Zipline)
venues.area: Na Chom Thian / Sattahip — between Nong Nooch and Golden Cliff Temple
venues.description: Pattaya jungle zipline park. 25-platform full course + half + kids. Bridges, ladders, abseil, ropes. Near Golden Cliff Temple.

venues.name: Pattaya Lawn Bowls Clubs (Banchang / Paradise / The Retreat)
venues.address: Banchang covered facility + Paradise Jomtien + The Retreat
venues.description: Three lawn bowls facilities. 14+ artificial rinks total. Banchang ฿250/day all-inclusive. Pattaya Sports Club League runs year-round.

venues.name: MAX Muay Thai Stadium Pattaya
venues.area: Sukhumvit Road — next to King Power Pattaya
venues.address: 42/108 Moo 9, Sukhumvit Road, Nongprue, Bang Lamung, Chonburi 20150
venues.hours: Nightly shows, usually 19:00 or 19:45 by date; doors around 18:45
venues.description: Pattaya daily Muay Thai stadium near King Power on Sukhumvit Road. Tourist-friendly live fight cards, online ticketing, and current listings that vary between 19:00 and 19:45 starts by date.

venues.name: Pattaya Kart Speedway
venues.description: First karting track in Pattaya — 1987, 35+ years. Two tracks (450m beginner + 750m pro). Multi-activity compound: ATV + paintball + bungee.

venues.name: Aquanauts Dive Center Pattaya
venues.area: Pattaya — boat departures from Bali Hai Pier
venues.address: Pattaya, Bang Lamung — Bali Hai Pier departures
venues.description: Pattaya only British/Dutch-owned PADI 5-Star CDC + National Geographic Dive Center. 13+ years. Full tech instructor pipeline. Conservation focus.

venues.name: Real Divers Pattaya
venues.area: Pattaya — boat departures from Bali Hai Pier
venues.description: Pattaya only British family-run PADI 5-Star IDC. Chandler brothers since 2005. 12m speedboat. Pattaya near islands + Samae San specialty.

venues.name: Dive Station Pattaya
venues.area: Pattaya — boat departures from Bali Hai Pier
venues.description: SSI-certified dive operation. First-timer + certified + snorkeling on same boat. Continental European visitor friendly.

venues.name: Cho Nateetong Thai Boxing Camp
venues.description: Authentic budget Pattaya Muay Thai camp. ~฿270 per session. Combined weight gym + dedicated Muay Thai area. Patient trainers with good pad time.

venues.name: Khao Chi Chan (Buddha Mountain) — Walking & Meditation
venues.area: Na Chom Thian / Sattahip — 20 km southeast of Pattaya
venues.address: Khao Chi Chan, Na Chom Thian, Sattahip District, Chonburi 20250
venues.description: FREE public walking + meditation site. Worlds largest cliff Buddha image (109m × 70m, 24-carat gold). 1995-96 royal Jubilee commission. Landscaped gardens.

venues.name: Pattaya Marathon (Amazing Thailand Pattaya Marathon)
venues.area: Pattaya Beach (full marathon route along the bay)
venues.description: Pattaya flagship annual road race since 1992. World Athletics International Standard. Fun Run / 10K / 21K / 42K. 15,000+ runners. Boston Qualifying valid.

venues.name: Pattaya Triathlon (Thailand Tri-League)
venues.area: Pattaya Beach + Sukhumvit Highway + Pattaya Hill
venues.address: Race start Bali Hai Pier, Pattaya
venues.hours: Tour Series — multiple races per year
venues.description: Most popular triathlon in Thailand. Thailand Tri-League series with Bangsaen + Pattaya + Sattahip. 1,500+ triathletes. Iconic Pattaya Hill run finish.

venues.name: Pattaya Boxing World Stadium
venues.description: Pattaya secondary Muay Thai fight stadium. Wed + Fri 20:00 real fights. Frank Sitpholek promoted. Multi-tier matchups (kids through pros). More authentic vs MAX.

venues.name: Nong Nooch Tropical Garden — Thai Cultural & Muay Thai Show
venues.area: Na Chom Thian / Sattahip — 20 km south of Pattaya
venues.description: Southeast Asia largest botanical garden (600 acres). Daily 90-min cultural show: Thai dance + Muay Thai demo + sword fighting + elephant show.

venues.name: Greenwood Golf Club & Resort (formerly Noble Place)
venues.area: Ban Bueng, Chonburi (1 hour from Pattaya, toward Chonburi)
venues.address: Greenwood Golf Club, Ban Bueng District, Chonburi
venues.description: 27-hole Peter Thomson + Dennis Wolveridge design. Tree-lined Chonburi hills. Australian Open Champion architect. Value pricing for premium architecture.

venues.name: Pattaya Public Running Routes & Parks (Beach + Mabprachan + City Parks)
venues.area: Multiple — Pattaya Beach, Jomtien Beach, Mabprachan, Pratumnak Park, Nongprue Park
venues.address: Pattaya Beach + Jomtien + Mabprachan + Pratumnak + Nongprue + others
venues.description: Free public running guide. Pattaya Beach 5.8km, Jomtien Beach, Mabprachan 4km loop, Pratumnak Park, Nongprue 1km, Chaiyapruek 400m track.

venues.name: Pattaya Beach Public Aerobics — Open-Air Free Fitness
venues.address: Pattaya Beach Road boardwalk + Jomtien Beach (multiple meet points)
venues.description: FREE open-air group fitness on Pattaya Beach + Jomtien Beach boardwalks. Daily Zumba aerobics, dance fitness, yoga, tai chi, stretching. No fee, no signup. Genuine Thai cultural fitness phenomenon. Pattaya most underrated daily wellness routine.

venues.name: Wong Amat Beach — Naklua / Pattaya's Family Swimming Beach
venues.address: Wong Amat Beach (access via Naklua Road, Soi 16), Naklua, Bang Lamung, Chonburi 20150
venues.description: Pattaya quietest, cleanest, most family-friendly main beach. ~1.5km long Naklua coastline with safe-swim zone, beach volleyball court, jet ski + banana boat (central section). Walking distance to Centara Grand Mirage, Cape Dara, and Sanctuary of Truth. Free.

venues.name: Big Buddha Hill (Wat Phra Yai) — Pratamnak Landmark + Stair Climb
venues.address: Wat Phra Yai, Pratamnak Hill, Pattaya, Bang Lamung, Chonburi 20150
venues.description: Pattaya iconic 18m golden Buddha at peak of Pratamnak Hill. Free entry. Accessed via 100+ step grand staircase (genuine cardio climb). 360 degree panoramic Pattaya Bay + Jomtien views. Sunrise/sunset photography. Active temple with resident monks. Dress code applies.

venues.name: Koh Larn (Coral Island) — Pattaya's Day-Trip Beach Destination
venues.area: Offshore — 7 km west of Pattaya (30-min ferry)
venues.address: Koh Larn, Banglamung District, Chonburi 20150 (ferry from Bali Hai Pier, Pattaya)
venues.description: Pattaya primary day-trip beach island. 30-min ferry from Bali Hai Pier. 6 beaches (Tawaen, Samae, Tien, Nual, Ta Yai, La). Parasailing, banana boats, jet ski, snorkeling, intro scuba, beach volleyball. Genuinely clearer water + whiter sand than mainland.

venues.name: Pattaya Archery Club
venues.address: 1/6 Moo 4, Tambon Huay-Yai, Bang Lamung, Chonburi 20150 (Pattaya Shooting Park)
venues.description: Non-profit archery club founded 2006. Beginner to expert. On-site bungalow accommodation, pool, tennis court, fishing boat. Affordable patient coaching.

venues.name: Pattaya Cricket Club
venues.address: Horseshoe Point Resort, 100 Moo 9, Tambon Pong, Bang Lamung, Chonburi 20150
venues.description: Established 2010. Only Pattaya cricket club competing in Bangkok Cricket League. 3 teams: Stallions (1st XI), Thoroughbreds (over-45), Juniors. Nov-June season.

venues.name: ATV & Off-Road Tours Pattaya (Multi-Operator)
venues.area: 30 min east of Pattaya — Pong Village near Lake Mabprachan + various
venues.address: 30 min east of Pattaya — Pong Village area
venues.description: Multiple ATV/Buggy/Enduro tour operators east of Pattaya. Polaris ATVs + 500cc CF MOTO + 660cc Buggies. Beginner to extreme tours. Hotel pickup free.

venues.name: Hilton Pattaya — Fitness Center, Spa & Pool
venues.area: Central Pattaya — Beach Road / Central Festival Mall
venues.description: 5-star Hilton with 24-hour fitness center, 16th-floor outdoor infinity pool, eforea Spa multi-award-winning. Beach Road central. Day-pass available.

venues.name: Andaz Pattaya Jomtien Beach (Hyatt)
venues.address: Andaz Pattaya Jomtien Beach, Na Jomtien, Sattahip
venues.description: 5-star Hyatt Andaz boutique. 24-hour Technogym fitness + 3 pools (adult/beachfront/family) + Panpuri Spa with 6 rooms + Japanese onsen + Turkish + Finnish baths.

venues.name: Pattaya Marriott Resort and Spa
venues.address: 64 Moo 1 Na Jomtien, Sattahip, Pattaya, Chonburi 20250
venues.description: 5-star Marriott Bonvoy beachfront resort on Na Jomtien Beach. Multiple outdoor pools, oceanfront fitness centre, Quan Spa (Marriott Asian-wellness signature), Kids Club, direct beach access. Asset World Corp operator.

venues.name: Renaissance Pattaya Resort & Spa
venues.description: 5-star Marriott Bonvoy Renaissance-brand beachfront resort, opened 2017. 257 rooms across 10 floors. 2 outdoor pools + kids pool + Kids Club + full-service spa + fitness centre. Modern design lifestyle brand. Na Jomtien beachfront.

venues.name: Centara Grand Mirage Beach Resort
venues.description: 5-star Lost World themed family resort. On-site water park + 230m private beach + Spa Cenvaree (24 rooms) + rock climbing wall + 2 tennis + Pilates/aqua/kayaking.

venues.name: Cape Dara Resort
venues.address: 256 Dara Beach, Soi 20 Naklua Rd, Naklua
venues.description: 5-star beach-cliff luxury. Infinity pool + Luminous Spa + mineral bath + sauna + steam + beauty centre + fitness with yoga classes.

venues.name: Mövenpick Siam Hotel Na Jomtien Pattaya
venues.address: Mövenpick Siam Hotel Na Jomtien Pattaya, Na Jomtien
venues.description: 5-star Swiss-hospitality (Accor). 24-hour 2nd-floor fitness with floor-to-ceiling windows. 262 rooms. Seafront + lagoon pools. Little Birds Kids Club.

venues.name: Dusit Thani Pattaya — Devarana Wellness
venues.description: Iconic 5-star Thai-heritage resort since 1973. Devarana Wellness with cascading waterfall garden, fitness centre, traditional Thai massage, yoga, meditation, active stretching. Two oceanfront pools + two private beaches + tennis history.

venues.name: Flight of the Gibbon — Khao Kheow Canopy Zipline
venues.area: Khao Kheow / Si Racha (1 hour from Pattaya, 90 min from Bangkok)
venues.address: Inside Khao Kheow Open Zoo, Si Racha District, Chonburi
venues.description: Largest canopy zipline in Thailand. 3 km course, 24 platforms. Inside Khao Kheow Open Zoo wildlife sanctuary. 2.5-hour zipline + zoo + lunch all-inclusive day.

venues.name: Underwater World Pattaya — Aquarium & Shark Dive Experience
venues.address: 22/22 Moo 11, Sukhumvit Rd, Nong Prue, Bang Lamung
venues.description: Pattaya only aquarium. First modern aquarium in Thailand (2003). 105m+ underwater tunnel. 5,000+ marine animals. 4 zones. Dive-with-sharks program for certified divers. Biggest jellyfish collection in Thailand.

venues.name: Pattaya Sky Ride — Helicopter Tours & Bangkok-Pattaya Charter
venues.area: Pattaya — landing pads at Royal Cliff Beach + various
venues.address: Pattaya — verify departure pad at booking
venues.description: Pattaya helicopter sightseeing + Bangkok-Pattaya charter (45-min). Airbus EC-135 + EC-130 aircraft. Up to 6 passengers. 129,200 THB Bangkok-Pattaya charter.

venues.name: Pattaya Panthers Rugby Football Club
venues.description: Pattaya only rugby club. Contact + touch rugby formats. Annual Pattaya Tens tournament in May with international touring teams. Beginner-friendly.

venues.name: SF Strike Bowl Pattaya (Central Festival)
venues.area: Central Festival Pattaya Beach Mall — 6th Floor
venues.address: 6th Floor, Central Festival Pattaya Beach Mall, Beach Road
venues.description: Modern mall-attached bowling — 16 regular + 2 VIP lanes (separate partitioned space). Pool tables + sea-view smoking lounge + arcade. SF Group operator. 180 baht/game.

venues.name: Megabreak Pool Hall Pattaya
venues.address: Soi Diana (Soi 13), off Second Road, Pattaya
venues.hours: Daily — late afternoon to late night
venues.description: Pattaya’s most respected dedicated pool hall. Tournament-class 9-foot pool tables + snooker. Long-running expat institution on Soi Diana, central Pattaya. ฿200–฿400/hour walk-in.

venues.name: Bangkok Hospital Pattaya — Sports Rehabilitation & Wellness
venues.address: 301 Moo 6, Sukhumvit Rd Km 143, Naklua, Bang Lamung, Chonburi 20150
venues.description: BDMS-network JCI-accredited international hospital. Rehabilitation Center for sports/orthopedic/neuro injuries. Prestige Wellness Anti-Aging Center with DNA fitness profiling and weight management. Medical anchor for Pattaya sport tourism.

venues.name: Pattaya Floating Market — Muay Talay & Cultural Activities
venues.address: 451/304 Moo 12, Sukhumvit Rd, Nong Prue, Bang Lamung
venues.description: Cultural-sport park on canals across 4 Thai regional zones. Live Muay Talay (water boxing on tree-trunk over canal) shows 3x daily. Rowboats, amphibious boats, water zipline, Thai dance. Distinctive Pattaya cultural-sport experience.

venues.name: Sanctuary of Truth — Wood Temple & Cultural-Sport Park
venues.address: 206/2 Soi Naklua 12, Naklua Rd, Bang Lamung, Pattaya 20150
venues.description: Pattaya iconic 105m all-teak wood temple, hand-carved without nails since 1981, still under active construction. On-site activities: horseback riding, speed boat tours, traditional Thai water-skill performance, walking grounds. Naklua peninsula setting.

venues.name: InterContinental Pattaya Resort
venues.address: 437 Phra Tamnak Road, Pratamnak Hill, Pattaya 20150
venues.description: 5-star IHG hilltop resort. 3 outdoor pools incl. 25m lap pool, Amburaya Spa, 24-hour fitness, on-site tennis courts, sea-view Cliff restaurant. Pratamnak Hill — adjacent to Royal Cliff / Fitz Club / Pickleball Pattaya luxury cluster.

venues.name: Holiday Inn Pattaya
venues.description: 4-star Beach Road IHG. Two outdoor infinity pools (Bay Tower L4 + Executive Tower L6), modern fitness centre with Pattaya Bay views, Tea Tree Spa, Kids Club. Central beachfront family-friendly stay.
